name: Chick Pea Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut eggplant into 1/2 inch dice, sprinkle with salt, place in a colander, put a weight on top and leave for 30 minutes.
2. Rinse eggplant and gently squeeze out as much liquid as possible.
3. Preheat oven to 400°F.
4. Sauté onion in half the oil in a large saucepan for 10 minutes. Remove with a slotted spoon and sauté eggplant pieces in the remaining oil until crisp and lightly browned. Drain on paper towels.
5. Put eggplant and onion into an ovenproof dish, then add garlic, tomatoes, chick peas, and pepper. Mix well. Cover and bake for 40-60 minutes. Garnish with fresh mint leaves.
